description_long: This is a medium-sized, single-family house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by a small landscaped yard featuring trees and shrubs. The house has a light-colored exterior, likely painted in white or light gray, with a prominent gable roof covered in dark shingles. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entryway is accentuated by a small porch with steps leading up from the sidewalk, flanked by decorative columns and greenery. A paved driveway connects the house to a straight, gray street, suggesting suburban or residential neighborhood placement. The landscaping includes a mix of grass, flowering bushes, and mature trees, enhancing the curb appeal.
description: A light-colored, gable-roofed house with a landscaped yard, symmetrical windows, and a welcoming porch entryway, set beside a paved street.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical windows, and landscaping with trees and bushes.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the driveway, side yard, and the connection to the street.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard area, additional windows, and more of the landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view showing the other side yard, trees, and the street connection.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front porch with steps, decorative columns, and a single main door
